scenarios.title: Embedding Retrieval and RAG Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task involves dense or sparse retrieval, retriever training, query/corpus encoding, FAISS search, reranking, retrieval evaluation, Tevatron, or multimodal/LLM retrieval models.
scenarios.role: Provides Tevatron-specific routing, command construction, data schemas, optional dependency guidance, and bundled safe helpers for neural retrieval workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Use when the task involves neural retriever datasets, retriever or reranker training, query/corpus encoding outputs, FAISS search, qrels, TREC runs, rerank JSONL, GradCache, LoRA retrievers, RepLLaMA, RankLLaMA, ColPali, DSE, Qwen, multimodal retrieval fields, or Tevatron module names such as tevatron.retriever and tevatron.reranker.
scenarios.best_for: Preparing Tevatron datasets, building retriever training commands, encoding embeddings, searching and merging retrieval results, preparing or running rerankers, and planning multimodal or LLM retriever workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for generic vector database usage, unrelated FAISS libraries, non-Tevatron Hugging Face training, or paper reproduction tasks that do not use Tevatron APIs and workflows.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `tevatron` over generic ML, RAG, or Hugging Face guidance when the task depends on retriever/reranker data schemas, training commands, encoding outputs, FAISS retrieval, rerank inputs, optional dependency boundaries, multimodal retrieval assets, or Tevatron module names and flags. Route within the skill by practical workflow: data preparation, training, encoding/search, reranking, or multimodal/LLM.
